fields.label: Company Province / Territory
fields.options:
AB - Alberta
BC - British Columbia
MB - Manitoba
NB - New Brunswick
NL - Newfoundland and Labrador
NS - Nova Scotia
NT - Northwest Territories
NU - Nunavut
ON - Ontario
PE - Prince Edward Island
QC - Quebec
SK - Saskatchewan
YT - Yukon
fields.description: Province or territory where this company is registered. Used to determine which tax accounts to create.
Uncheck for companies not registered to collect Canadian sales taxes (e.g. a US subsidiary). All tax injection will be skipped for this company.
fields.label: Collects Canadian Sales Tax

fields.options: This company does not collect Canadian sales tax — no tax will be injected on any document.

fields.label: Small Supplier (Annual taxable supplies under $30,000 CAD)
fields.description: When enabled, no GST/HST will be applied to any document. Required if not registered for GST/HST.

fields.options: Small Supplier mode is ON — no Canadian tax will be injected on any document for this company.

fields.label: GST Account
fields.description: Account for Goods and Services Tax (5%). Used in AB, BC, MB, NT, NU, QC, SK, YT.

fields.label: HST Account
fields.description: Account for Harmonized Sales Tax. Used in NB (15%), NL (15%), NS (15%), ON (13%), PE (15%).

fields.label: PST / RST Account
fields.description: Account for Provincial Sales Tax. Used in BC (7%), MB (7%), SK (6%).

fields.label: QST Account
fields.description: Account for Quebec Sales Tax (9.975%). Used in QC only.

fields.label: GST/HST Registration No.
fields.description: Format: 123456789 RT0001 — printed on CA Tax Invoice.

fields.label: QST Registration No.
fields.description: Format: 1234567890 TQ0001 — printed on CA Tax Invoice when operating in QC.

fields.label: BC PST Registration No.
fields.description: Required if collecting BC Provincial Sales Tax. Format: PST-XXXX-XXXX.

fields.label: SK PST Business ID
fields.description: Required if collecting Saskatchewan PST. Issued by Saskatchewan Finance.

fields.label: MB RST Number
fields.description: Required if collecting Manitoba Retail Sales Tax. Issued by Manitoba Finance.

fields.label: Use ERPNext Tax Rules
fields.description: Enable ERPNext native Tax Rules for automatic Canadian tax matching. Uncheck to disable all CA Tax Rules for this company.
